3248650.name: JOBifAI
3248650.description:
In this short comedic Visual Novel (VN) with branching paths, you need to convince a job interviewer of your artistic ability by typing out your best arguments, using natural language.

With your language skills, you will need to use every clue in the dialogue and the images to win in a battle of wit.

The typical VN formula is enhanced with AI interactions that allow for free-form interactions: describe it with plain words, and see how the game plays it out.

A playthrough should last at most 20 minutes; try to collect all endings and find all secrets!

JOBifAI: Harness the Power of AI to Land Your Dream Job!

Imagine waking up to the thrilling news: Grizley Studios, a leading game company, wants to interview you for your dream position tomorrow. The catch? You've completely forgotten what you submitted!

Fortunately, you've got a stunning CV and a portfolio crafted by cutting-edge AI technology. Now, it's your time to shine! Can you convince the art director that your work is the perfect fit for their visionary project?

Step into the challenge with JOBifAI, where your creativity, wit, and persuasive skills are put to the ultimate test!

Key Features:

  • Hand-crafted pixel art and killer soundtrack: made by a team of talented indie artists

  • Dynamic Challenge: Every playthrough is unique! Experience randomly generated series concepts and portfolios, ensuring no two interviews are the same.

  • Unleash Your Creativity: When faced with stunning series artwork and an AI-generated portfolio, it's up to you to weave a convincing narrative. Convince the interviewer that your portfolio is a deliberate and meaningful artistic choice that enhances the series concept.

  • Free-Form Interaction: Engage in a rich, AI-based dialogue system that allows for true exploration of your ideas. Whether you want to elaborate on design elements or discuss thematic depth, the dialogue options adapt to your unique approach!

  • Challenge Your Persuasion Skills: The game employs an advanced evaluation system that assesses your explanations, making each interaction feel authentic and impactful. Can you think on your feet and turn the tables in your favor?

  • Artistic Inspiration: Draw from countless artistic styles and concepts as the AI generates both the portfolio and series artwork. Explore a wide array of visual themes and storytelling potentials!

Are you ready to turn your luck around and land your dream job at Grizley Studios? Step into the spotlight, showcase your creativity, and make your case in JOBifAI!
3248650.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
